text.title: Laravel Queues Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for shipping a safe queue job.

step.name: scaffold-job
step.action: Run `php artisan make:job SendOrderConfirmationJob`. Implement ShouldQueue. Constructor takes primitive ID + idempotency key.

step.name: set-tries-timeout-backoff
step.action: Set $tries (3-5), $timeout (≤downstream p99 * 1.5), backoff() returning array of seconds with jitter.

step.name: make-idempotent
step.action: In handle(): reload model; check whether already processed (e.g. confirmation_sent_at column); skip if so. Optionally use WithoutOverlapping middleware with idempotency key.

step.name: implement-failed
step.action: Implement `failed(Throwable $e)`: log structured + capture to Sentry + Slack notify operator with job context.

step.name: route-to-named-queue
step.action: Dispatch via `SendOrderConfirmationJob::dispatch($orderId)->onQueue('mail')`. Configure Horizon supervisor: separate worker process for 'mail' queue.
